lks2.objective: Develop scattering throws across the field to maximise running points while the fielding team coordinates the return.
successCriteria: Throws spread the ball into different parts of the field
Fielders communicate who collects which ball

uks2.objective: Refine fielding strategy and batter tactics — pre-assign zones, choose throws or strikes to find gaps, time the run-home call.
successCriteria: Fielders pre-assign zones / positions before play
Batter targets the longest gap from the hoop
Team races the ball back via the fastest route

space.description: A diamond with 4 bases. Hoop placed in the centre or beside home base for ball returns.

steps: Split the class into small teams.
The batter either throws 3 consecutive balls into the field, or the fielders bowl the balls to be struck.
Once all the balls are in the field the batter must attempt to run around all the bases and get back home (1 point per base they run past).
The fielders must field all the balls and return them to the hoop.
Score points until the batter is home or all balls are in the hoop.
questions: Where is the best place to throw or strike the ball?
What is the quickest way of returning the balls to the hoop?

step.task: Allow the batters to use an object to strike the ball

errors.issue: Ball bouncing out of the hoop
errors.cause: Throwing too hard from close range
errors.fix: Cue 'place it, don't pelt it' for short throws

errors.issue: Two fielders chasing the same ball
errors.fix: Stop play, restart with everyone calling 'mine'
Reward placement: 'pick a gap before you hit'
